creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: wg
Date: Thu May 22 14:12:25 2014
New Revision: 354844
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/354844
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r354844/

Log:
  security/sssd: fix since libtoolize conversion
  
  PR:		ports/190090
  Submitted by:	maintainer

Modified:
  head/security/sssd/Makefile
  head/security/sssd/pkg-plist

Modified: head/security/sssd/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/security/sssd/Makefile	Thu May 22 14:08:01 2014	(r354843)
+++ head/security/sssd/Makefile	Thu May 22 14:12:25 2014	(r354844)
@@ -105,6 +105,7 @@ post-patch:
 
 post-install:
 	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/src/examples/sssd-example.conf ${STAGEDIR}${ETCDIR}/sssd.conf.sample
+	(cd ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/lib && ${LN} -s nss_sss.so nss_sss.so.1)
 
 	# clean these up from the install; we create them in rc script start_precmd
 .for VARDIRS in db/sss db/sss_mc log/sssd run/sss/krb5.include.d run/sss/private run/sss

Modified: head/security/sssd/pkg-plist
==============================================================================
--- head/security/sssd/pkg-plist	Thu May 22 14:08:01 2014	(r354843)
+++ head/security/sssd/pkg-plist	Thu May 22 14:12:25 2014	(r354844)
@@ -13,6 +13,7 @@ lib/libsss_idmap.so.0
 lib/libsss_idmap.so.0.0.1
 lib/libsss_sudo.so
 lib/nss_sss.so
+lib/nss_sss.so.1
 lib/nss_sss.so.2
 lib/nss_sss.so.2.0.0
 lib/pam_sss.so
